resources.string: End-to-end encrypted network for people, agents, and devices
Device Center\nManage and control your devices
Security Center\nView security status and permissions
My QR Code\nShow this device identity
Call OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, and other APIs directly on the phone
Scan trusted contacts, or add multiple cloud models directly on the phone.
Add Hermes, computers, friends, or devices
Provider → Model → API Key, called directly on the phone
Each cloud model is saved as an independent contact. Multiple providers and models can coexist.
Use another or newly released model from %1$s
API Key, Model ID, and Endpoint cannot be empty
Configure the API Key for %1$s first
GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4 mini/nano, and other OpenAI API models
Claude Opus, Sonnet, Haiku; uses Messages API
Gemini Pro / Flash / Flash Lite; direct Google API from the phone
Qwen 3.7 Max/Plus, Qwen 3.6 Flash; DashScope OpenAI compatible
Unified access to multiple cloud models with custom routing
Each member must confirm fingerprints independently
Group session keys and member state management
Select contacts first, then complete group identity verification
Generate group session keys and notify members
Group chat implementation is not enabled in this version
Private AI assistant connected through the PC endpoint
Local coding and engineering collaboration assistant
Terminal collaboration and code editing assistant
Local model inference and task planning
Any CLI or MCP wrapper command
Home device and smart home control
New connections require mutual confirmation to protect privacy and identity
Process sensitive devices and tasks offline
Connect a device endpoint, broker, tool, or trusted Agent
HTTP, MQTT, WebSocket, TCP, UDP, MCP, Agent, BLE, or Matter
URL, broker URI, host:port, MAC, or contact ID
Topic, MCP tool, characteristic, or verified contact ID
High-risk connectors always require secondary confirmation
Allow this connector to appear as an Agent device target
Remove the connector and its stored credentials
Device name and endpoint are required
Secure connection between people, AI, and devices
Long-lived access token stored on this device
Transfer images, voice, and backup files
Let AI actively handle fixed tasks
Run a saved workflow when an event matches
Remove this trigger without deleting the saved workflow
Use: trigger workflow Name when charging
Push news and status every day at 08:00
Check PC, MQTT, and file services
Notify when the PC is offline or storage is abnormal
Regular learning review and key questions
End-to-end encryption. Only verified devices and contacts can communicate.
Scanned and fingerprint-confirmed Desktop devices will appear here.
Microphone, camera, notifications, and on-device execution require phone-side authorization
The first scan requires manual confirmation of phone and computer fingerprints
Communication requires scanning the QR code again after deletion
Delete Agent trust and sessions under this computer. A new scan will be required.
After revocation, communication requires scanning again and confirming fingerprints.
Delete all computer and Agent trust relationships. A new scan will be required.
Reads the active screen structure after user authorization so SignalASI can plan local tasks.
Tap here to open Accessibility settings
OCR text is available; enable Accessibility for actions
The scheduled workflow no longer exists.
Another Agent task is active. This run was skipped safely.
Execution is paused. Resume when you are ready.
The current Agent plan was cancelled
SignalASI - ask before action - high-risk guard on
Goal received - building a safe local plan
Screen content stays on this device and is processed in memory
Screen capture permission was not granted
Screen image could not be read
Search screen text, actions, or fields
Direct reply available · tap to draft
Enable screen access to inspect this page

Action: %1$s
Target: %2$s
Risk: %3$s

This action can affect security, privacy, property, or other people. Confirm again to execute it.
Enter a goal for SignalASI Agent
Voice command binding is coming next
Confirm that both fingerprints match before saving the trust relationship
Hermes, Codex, Claude, local models, and custom Agents will appear as contacts
Choose the display language for SignalASI
Protected by the SignalASI Link end-to-end session
This desktop connector has revoked phone pairing. Scan the SignalASI QR code again before communicating.
SignalASI Desktop connection status has been updated.
Welcome to SignalASI. Your local identity and fingerprint have been regenerated. Scan and add Hermes Agent to start your secure private AI Mesh.
Keeps the MQTT secure session and offline message recovery running
Message connection is running in the background
Hold to talk and start recording
Debug send failed: secure channel is not ready
Inherits SignalASI Link Protocol encrypted session rules
Important state changes are written to the local audit log
Only verified contacts and group members are included
Uses only on-device models or PC local models
Switches between MQTT, Relay, and local links
Used by the phone Agent only after authorization
Currently off; data does not leave this device
Applies to this account, verified contacts, and paired devices
Open the detail page to view status, audit records, and notes
Manage switches, permissions, and notification policies
Visible content and local storage permissions are checked before copying
State is synced to the local audit log after enabling
Related tasks stop after disabling; history stays on this device
Select contacts and finish verification to continue
Status updates automatically with devices, contacts, and protocol state
Only local chat history is deleted. Contacts are not affected.
Scan and pair again before communicating.
Add and verify this contact again before communicating.
Contact deleted. Add it again before communicating.
Both sides must confirm identity after scanning
Only changes the display name on this phone, not the real identity of the PC or Agent
Notify verified contacts to update your nickname after saving
Scanned QR codes and incoming requests will appear here
After wake-up, play the Xiaoxiao welcome voice and keep listening through ASR.
Keep listening for wake words on the voice page
Use TTS to play Agent replies automatically
SignalASI,signal asi,signal a s i,signal,asi,signal ai,hello,hi
I am here. Welcome to SignalASI. Say your question or task.
Enable it in Settings > Voice Wake & ASR/TTS
Allow recording permission to enable low-power listening
No speech recognition service is available on this system
openWakeWord runs offline without network access
Check the model file and microphone permission
Switch to PC faster-whisper in Settings
Recording starts when speech is detected; 3 seconds of silence sends it
Speech detected. Stop talking for 3 seconds to send
No valid speech heard, continuing to listen
Recognizer is recovering and will continue soon
Manage perception, voice, and automation permissions
Tap to switch observation, suggestion, confirmation, or low-risk automation
Always protect payments, deletion, privacy sharing, installation, and security changes
Allow Agent tasks and explicit notes to update long-term memory and knowledge
Immediately stop automatic execution while keeping observation available
Let a configured cloud model propose ActionPlans; Android validates every action locally
Include non-sensitive visible text and element labels in model planning requests
Choose the configured cloud model that proposes ActionPlans
Limit each model-generated plan to 4, 8, or 12 validated actions
Allow the Agent runtime to capture structured screen context
Allow confirmed taps, text input, navigation, intents, and system actions
Allow tasks to be routed to trusted local, desktop, and cloud connectors
Allow confirmed Home Assistant and trusted device control
Read screen structure and perform confirmed local actions
Capture the selected screen in memory and extract text with on-device OCR
Can be disabled for automation scenarios
Background message alerts and security prompts
Back up identity, contacts, Agent data, and optional chat history
Memory, knowledge, workflows, schedules and event triggers, task history, safety settings, and Home Assistant configuration
Enter the password used during export.
Backup imported. Please restart the app.
This deletes identity, contacts, chat history, keys, cache, and backup data.
Create a new SignalASI ID and identity fingerprint
Deleted contacts must be added again before communication
Clear message history and temporary files
Secure communication and Agent collaboration protocol
Wait for peer confirmation after a message is sent
Receive queued messages after the app has been closed
Save peer public keys after the first scan
Old devices become invalid after pairing is updated
Key pairs, identity fingerprints, and first-use verification
PC Agent is running the current protocol
View key handshakes and delivery status
Show transport data and step details
